text.title: Prompt Basics — Output Contract
text.summary: Rendered messages array from a PromptTemplate, ready for client.chat.completions.create. Captures shape and roles.

list.item: First message MUST be `role: system` with non-empty content.
Last message MUST be `role: user` with non-empty content.
Few-shot examples alternate `user`+`assistant` between the system and the final user message.
No empty content strings; no missing roles.

antipattern.reason: Default behaviour without a system role varies by model; outputs are inconsistent.

antipattern.description: User-supplied text inserted into the system role.
antipattern.reason: Prompt-injection sink — user can override constraints.
Attention decays; tokens balloon without quality lift.

example.note: Invalid: no system message; output format unspecified; topic undirected.
